---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation or examples
labels: documentation
---

## Summary

Describe what part of the documentation should be improved.

## Current page or file

Link the file or page if possible.

## What is unclear or missing

Explain what is confusing, incomplete, outdated, or missing.

## Suggested improvement

Describe how the documentation could be clearer or more useful.

## Additional context

Add examples, screenshots, or references if helpful.
